channel.title: Cast
channel.description: Lighting controller for HyperX QuadCast 2 S microphones — release feed.

item.title: Version 1.0.1
item.description:
Cast 1.0.1

The first time you run Cast it now opens automatically and explains what permissions it needs before macOS asks. The system dialogs only fire when you click the in-app "Grant" buttons, not as a surprise.

The mic returns to dark when you quit, instead of staying stuck on whatever was last showing.

Switching to an audio-reactive mode (EQ, Prism, VU Meter, Spectrum Waterfall) no longer crashes the app. The visualizations also follow your system default input now — change the active mic in Sound preferences and the lighting tracks the new device.

Right-click the menubar icon for a quick context menu (Settings, About, Check for Updates, Quit). The same menu is also behind the gear in the main panel.

Three smaller things: the menubar icon now matches the app icon's "C" mark, the entire "Advanced" row toggles instead of just the chevron, and the popover stays open while you're picking a color.
